ksa_text: Execute AI system testing activities including functional testing, integration testing, automated testing, and acceptance testing to validate system performance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-T-004 (Risk Management/Task) scores 0.522 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.522) and is edge_case for the AI Engineer role. Core role signal: 3 pattern match(es). Seniority is appropriate for this role.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include rests on NIST AI RMF signal (0.522) for Risk Management (prior=out). NIST AI RMF scores governance/policy content systematically — false-signal risk for non-technical domains.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. NIST AI RMF alignment on Risk Management KSAs is systematic co-occurrence with governance language, not AI Engineer work product. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk Management KSA (composite 0.522)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis does not surface this Risk Management competency as a standard AI Engineer requirement. Exclusion consistent with the role's technical focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
